# flashblade_qos_policy (Data Source)

Reads an existing FlashBlade QoS policy by name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "flashblade_qos_policy" "example" {
  name = "my-qos-policy"
}

output "qos_max_bandwidth" {
  value = data.flashblade_qos_policy.example.max_total_bytes_per_sec
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the QoS policy.

### Read-Only

- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the QoS policy is enabled.
- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the QoS policy.
- `is_local` (Boolean) Whether the QoS policy is local to this array.
- `max_total_bytes_per_sec` (Number) Maximum total bandwidth in bytes per second.
- `max_total_ops_per_sec` (Number) Maximum total operations (IOPS) per second.
- `policy_type` (String) The type of the QoS policy (e.g. bandwidth-limit).
